My first report was incorrectly closed with a response of ?no violation?. There were 1-2 days when these men randomly moved elsewhere but they came right back. (Of note, they always move for a few hours on Sunday mornings but return by Sunday afternoon.) There are 2 men camped here 99.9 percent of the time. One sleeps on the church steps with his belongings, wheelchair, and shopping cart spilling onto the sidewalk. The other sleeps at the church?s adjacent preschool around the corner. They walk back and forth to the corner of 7th and litter that area with trash and food debris. They make lewd comments to passersby, especially women. I have to walk by here with my dogs early am and late pm and do not feel safe. As previously mentioned, there is a preschool around the corner from their main location and one of them sleeps on the preschool grounds nightly. With respect, I invested my life savings to buy property in San Diego and exorbitant property taxes along with it. I see none of that money working for me.
